trigger_condition: before or after content uses Windows-style \r\n line endings
potential_consequence: Trailing \r remains on every line. LCS comparison fails to match identical lines. Full-file diff produced when content is semantically identical.
If unchangedAfter is 0 or 1, subtraction wraps hunkEnd below hunkBegin, producing a negative-length hunk range in @@ line.

trigger_condition: hunk contains only removed lines and no added lines (or vice versa at file edge)
potential_consequence: Line number may be incorrect for hunks at the very beginning of a file when the first lines are removed.

trigger_condition: translatorResults contain artifacts with paths that include '..' or absolute-style paths (e.g., '/etc/passwd')
potential_consequence: Zip slip vulnerability — artifact paths with '../' could write files outside the intended archive directory when extracted.

trigger_condition: currentByPath.get(initial.path) returns undefined (artifact was removed from translators)
potential_consequence: Artifact treated as having empty content rather than removed. Diff shows deletion of all lines (correct), but the removed-artifact loop at line 263-265 then adds a duplicate pair with after: "".

trigger_condition: artifact path appears in initialGeneratedArtifacts AND in currentArtifacts with different content, AND also appears in the 'added' or 'removed' path
guard_snippet: Three separate loops — initial map, add-new, add-removed
potential_consequence: Same artifact path can appear multiple times in pairs array if it crosses multiple categories. generatePatchBundle produces duplicate diff entries for the same file.

trigger_condition: before or after content is a single line without trailing newline (e.g., just 'content')
potential_consequence: Single-line content works correctly. No trailing empty line token. Handled.

trigger_condition: handleCreatePlaybook throws during initial artifact generation (t.translate(nextPlaybook) fails)
potential_consequence: If t.translate throws, the setInitialGeneratedArtifacts call is not reached, leaving state as null. handleDownloadPatch then exits early. Graceful degradation.
